old_example: On Monday mornings, the entire office gathers for a brief status update on current projects.
new_example: On Monday mornings, the office gathers for status updates today.
new_translation: Vào các sáng thứ Hai, văn phòng tập trung để cập nhật dự án.

old_example: Ms. Morrison has been selected as the new Human Resources Director for our North American regional office.
new_example: Ms. Morrison has been selected as the new Human Resources Director today.
new_translation: Bà Morrison đã được chọn làm Giám đốc Nhân sự mới hôm nay.

old_example: The bricklayer mixed the sand and cement to make the mortar for the wall.
new_example: The bricklayer mixed the sand and cement for the mortar today.
new_translation: Người thợ xây đã trộn cát và xi măng để làm vữa hôm nay.

old_example: The young couple decided to take out a thirty-year fixed-rate mortgage from their local bank to purchase their first family home in the suburbs.
new_example: The couple decided to take out a mortgage for their home today.
new_translation: Cặp vợ chồng quyết định thực hiện một khoản vay thế chấp hôm nay.

old_example: The atrium of the new office building is decorated with a stunning mosaic made from recycled glass tiles.
new_example: The atrium is decorated with a stunning mosaic today.
new_translation: Đại sảnh được trang trí bằng một bức tranh khảm tuyệt đẹp hôm nay.

old_example: The museum features an extensive collection of ancient Roman mosaics discovered during local excavations.
new_example: The museum features an extensive collection of ancient Roman mosaics today.
new_translation: Bảo tàng có bộ sưu tập phong phú các bức tranh khảm La Mã.

old_example: She decided to take a break from her career to focus on the challenges and joys of early motherhood.
new_example: She decided to take a break to focus on early motherhood today.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã quyết định tạm nghỉ để tập trung làm mẹ hôm nay.

old_example: The shareholder made a formal motion regarding the new international merger agreement during the annual departmental meeting.
new_example: The shareholder made a motion regarding the new merger agreement today.
new_translation: Cổ đông đưa ra kiến nghị về thỏa thuận sáp nhập hôm nay.

old_example: The manager managed to motivate the entire team to work harder on the successful international marketing project.
new_example: The manager motivated the entire team to work harder today.
new_translation: Quản lý đã thúc đẩy cả nhóm làm việc chăm chỉ hơn hôm nay.

old_example: Maintaining high professional motivation is essential for the future growth and success of our international technology corporation.
new_example: Maintaining high motivation is essential for the future growth today.
new_translation: Duy trì động lực cao là thiết yếu cho sự tăng trưởng hôm nay.
